name: Cranberry Orange Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 cup fresh or frozen (thawed) cranberries, cut into quarters
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat egg with fork in large bowl.
2. Stir in milk, vegetable oil, cranberries, and orange peel.
3. Stir in flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt until combined just until the flour is moistened (batter will be lumpy).
4. Spread batter evenly in a lined loaf pan, ensuring it covers the bottom completely.
5. Shield the ends of the loaf pan with 2-inch wide strips of foil, covering 1 inch of batter on all sides around the handles.
6. Place the loaf pan on the microwave.
7. Microwave at 50% (medium) for 9 minutes.
8. Increase power to high and microwave for an additional 2 to 4 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
9. Remove foil after 2 minutes.
10. If desired, sprinkle with coconut before serving.
11. Let stand on a rack for 10 minutes before removing the loaf from the pan.
12. Cool completely. One loaf.
